title: Backend Engineer
description: We build scalable APIs and microservices using Java, Spring Boot, and PostgreSQL. You will work on our core platform, design database schemas, and integrate with Redis and Elasticsearch. Experience with REST and GraphQL required.

title: Software Engineer - Platform
description: Design and develop backend services in Go and Python. Work with MySQL, PostgreSQL, and Kafka. Build APIs and maintain our server-side infrastructure. We use Docker and Kubernetes in AWS. You will work on our core platform and integrate with internal services.

title: Frontend Engineer
description: Build user interfaces with React, TypeScript, and Next.js. Work with designers using Figma. Strong CSS, Tailwind, and responsive web design. Experience with Redux and Vite.

title: Senior Frontend Developer
description: Create beautiful web experiences with JavaScript, Vue, and modern CSS. You will own our design system and work with Angular and Svelte on various products. HTML, SASS, and Webpack experience required.

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: We need a fullstack developer who can work on both our React frontend and Node.js/Express backend. You will build features end-to-end, from database to UI. PostgreSQL and REST APIs.

title: Software Engineer
description: Full-stack role: build web applications with React and Node. You will work on the frontend with TypeScript and the backend with Express and NestJS. MongoDB and Redis. Agile team. End-to-end feature development from database to UI.

title: Data Engineer
description: Build and maintain ETL pipelines using Apache Spark, Airflow, and Python. Work with Snowflake, Databricks, and dbt. Data warehouse and lakehouse architecture. SQL and Scala. Experience with Kafka and Redshift.

title: Software Engineer - Data Platform
description: We are looking for a software engineer to build our data platform. You will develop ETL pipelines, work with Spark and PySpark, and manage data in our warehouse. Python, SQL, Pandas, and Airflow. Integrate APIs and build pipelines for analytics.

title: Senior Software Engineer
description: Join our data engineering team. Build scalable data pipelines with Kafka, Airflow, and Python. Work with big data technologies including Hadoop and Hive. ETL design, data warehouse, and Databricks. SQL and database expertise required.

title: Data Engineer - ETL
description: Design ETL pipelines using Informatica, dbt, and Glue. Work with Redshift, Delta Lake, and Iceberg. Python, SQL, and Scala. Data platform and warehouse experience.

title: GCP Data Engineer
description: We are looking for a skilled GCP Data Engineer with strong expertise in BigQuery, Python, Airflow, and Git. Design and build scalable data pipelines using Python. Work extensively with BigQuery for data processing, optimization, and analytics. Implement workflow orchestration using Airflow and Cloud Composer. GCP and cloud data solutions.

title: Data Analyst
description: Create dashboards and reports in Tableau and Power BI. Business intelligence and analytics. SQL and Excel. A/B testing and statistics. Work with stakeholders on visualization and reporting.

title: Data Scientist
description: Build predictive models using Python, scikit-learn, and PyTorch. Statistical analysis, Jupyter notebooks, pandas and numpy. Mathematics and machine learning. R programming is a plus.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Manage cloud infrastructure on AWS and GCP. Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, and Ansible. CI/CD with Jenkins. Linux, bash scripting. Prometheus and Grafana for monitoring. Site reliability focus.

title: Mobile Engineer
description: Build iOS and Android apps with React Native and Flutter. Experience with Swift and Kotlin. Mobile developer role. We also use Dart and native development.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Work on ML models and deep learning. NLP and computer vision. PyTorch, Tensorflow, Keras. Hugging Face and transformer models. Generative AI and LLMs. Python and Python.

title: QA Automation Engineer
description: Automate testing with Selenium, Cypress, and Playwright. SDET role. Write tests in Python with pytest and JUnit. Quality assurance and manual testing when needed.

title: Security Engineer
description: Secure our infrastructure and applications. Cyber security, vulnerability assessment, and penetration testing. Network security and cryptography. Work with infosec and SOC teams.

title: Embedded Software Engineer
description: Develop firmware and drivers in C and C++. Experience with RTOS, microcontrollers, and low-level systems. TCP/IP, embedded systems. Optional: FPGA, Verilog, assembly.

title: Software Engineer - Infrastructure
description: Backend-focused role. Build APIs in Go and Python. PostgreSQL, Redis, and microservices. We use AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes. Some overlap with SRE and infrastructure.

title: Technical Program Manager
description: Coordinate engineering projects. Work with product and engineering on roadmap and backlog. Agile and Scrum. User stories and stakeholder management. Not a coding-heavy role.
